name: integration_women_aged_3555_are_the_most_profitable
method:
Women aged 35-55 are the most profitable and most ignored audience on the entire internet and the numbers on this are actually insane…

This demographic controls 85% of household purchasing decisions

phases.name: audit
steps: scan DEPLOYMENT_URLS for all live apps
score each for W35-55 appeal (colors, copy, features, pain points)

phases.name: reposition
steps: generate alternate headlines/copy targeting W35-55 pain points (household management, wellness, faith, organization)

phases.name: distribute
steps: create A/B test entries in LEDGER/AB_TESTS_MASTER.csv
